description: MCP server for managing Naver Cloud Platform (Ncloud) infrastructure
name: io.github.sjk4425/ncloud

environmentVariables.description: Ncloud region code (KR, JPN, SGN, USWN, DEN)
environmentVariables.name: NCLOUD_REGION

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated tool groups to load, e.g. 'compute,network,billing' or 'all,-billing'. Unset = all groups. common is always on.
environmentVariables.name: NCLOUD_TOOL_GROUPS

environmentVariables.description: Set to '1' to strip empty values (null/""/[]/{}) from responses globally.
environmentVariables.name: NCLOUD_RESPONSE_PRUNE

environmentVariables.description: API request timeout in milliseconds (default 30000). HTTP 429 is auto-retried up to 2 times.
environmentVariables.name: NCLOUD_TIMEOUT_MS
